forecast.shortForecast: Slight Chance Rain Showers then Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
forecast.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers before 11am, then a slight chance of showers and thunderstorms between 2pm and 3pm. Mostly sunny. High near 93, with temperatures falling to around 91 in the afternoon. West southwest wind around 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms between 9pm and 1am, then showers and thunderstorms likely between 1am and 2am, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 2am and 5am. Mostly cloudy. Low around 66, with temperatures rising to around 70 overnight. Southwest wind 8 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 24 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

sections.header: Traffic Impact: The intersection will be closed to all through traffic
sections.content: . Please follow the posted detour route during construction.

nubsNob.comments: Thank-you for a fantastic winter at Nub's Nob! This was a true Northern Michigan winter with 188" of snow and sustained cold. This summer our Crew will be busy replacing our beloved Orange lift with a new fixed grip quad lift from SkyTrac. This lift is built in the USA and will be nearly identical to the new Green lift that was installed in 2023. Thanks for skiing and riding at Nub's Nob.
